Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?active=true&closed=false&limit=10&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for e in data[:5]:
    markets = e.get\('markets', []\)
    binary = [m for m in markets if len\(json.loads\(m.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\)\) == 2]
    print\(f'--- {e[\\"title\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  volume24hr: {e[\\"volume24hr\\"]:,.0f}'\)
    print\(f'  negRisk: {e.get\(\\"negRisk\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  markets count: {len\(markets\)}'\)
    if binary:
        m = binary[0]
        print\(f'  binary question: {m[\\"question\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'  outcomePrices: {m.get\(\\"outcomePrices\\"\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?active=true&closed=false&limit=3&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for e in data[:2]:
    print\(f'--- {e[\\"title\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'  tags: {e.get\(\\"tags\\", []\)}'\)
    markets = e.get\('markets', []\)
    # find highest yes-price market
    best = None
    best_price = -1
    for m in markets:
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomePrices','[]'\)\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i, o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\) == 'yes'\), 0\)
            p = float\(prices[yes_idx]\)
            if p > best_price:
                best_price = p
                best = m
        except: pass
    if best:
        print\(f'  best market \(highest Yes\): {best[\\"question\\"]} — {best_price*100:.1f}%'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?active=true&closed=false&limit=5&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
for e in data[:5]:
    markets = e.get\('markets', []\)
    # Sort by individual volume to find top market
    sorted_m = sorted\(markets, key=lambda m: float\(m.get\('volumeNum', 0\)\), reverse=True\)
    best = sorted_m[0] if sorted_m else None
    if best:
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(best.get\('outcomePrices','[]'\)\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(best.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i, o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\) == 'yes'\), 0\)
            p = float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100
        except: p = 50
        print\(f'EVENT: {e[\\"title\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'  vol24h total: \\${e[\\"volume24hr\\"]:,.0f}'\)
        print\(f'  top sub-market: {best[\\"question\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'  probability: {p:.1f}%'\)
        print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

    sorted_m = sorted\(markets, key=lambda m: float\(m.get\('volumeNum', 0\) or 0\), reverse=True\)

    if best:

            prices = json.loads\(best.get\('outcomePrices','[]'\)\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(best.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\)

            p = float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100
        except: p = 50
        vol = e.get\('volume24hr', 0\)
        print\(f'EVENT: {e[\\"title\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'  vol24h: {vol:,.0f}'\)
        print\(f'  top sub-market: {best[\\"question\\"]}'\)
        print\(f'  probability: {p:.1f}%'\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?active=true&closed=false&limit=20&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys

TAG_TO_CATEGORY = {
  'politics': 'POLITICS', 'elections': 'POLITICS', 'election': 'POLITICS',
  'crypto': 'CRYPTO', 'bitcoin': 'CRYPTO', 'ethereum': 'CRYPTO',
  'sports': 'SPORTS', 'soccer': 'SPORTS', 'nba': 'SPORTS', 'nfl': 'SPORTS',
  'fifa-world-cup': 'SPORTS', '2026-fifa-world-cup': 'SPORTS',
  'economy': 'ECONOMY', 'fed-rates': 'ECONOMY', 'fed': 'ECONOMY',
  'technology': 'TECH', 'ai': 'TECH', 'openai': 'TECH',
  'geopolitics': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'war': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'russia': 'GEOPOLITICS',
  'ukraine': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'china': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'iran': 'GEOPOLITICS',
  'middle-east': 'GEOPOLITICS',
}

def get_category\(e\):
    for tag in e.get\('tags', []\):
        s = \(tag.get\('slug'\) or ''\).lower\(\)
        if s in TAG_TO_CATEGORY: return TAG_TO_CATEGORY[s]
    text = f'{e[\\"title\\"]} {e[\\"slug\\"]}'.lower\(\)
    for kw, cat in [\('crypto','CRYPTO'\),\('world cup','SPORTS'\),\('nba','SPORTS'\),\('fed rate','ECONOMY'\),\('inflation','ECONOMY'\),\('war','GEOPOLITICS'\),\('russia','GEOPOLITICS'\),\('election','POLITICS'\),\('president','POLITICS'\),\('ai ','TECH'\)]:
        if kw in text: return cat
    return 'TRENDING'

def pick_best\(markets\):
    parsed = []
    for m in markets:
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomePrices','[]'\)\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomePrices'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomePrices', []\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomes'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomes', []\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i, o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\) == 'yes'\), 0\)
            p = round\(float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100\)
            parsed.append\({'q': m['question'], 'p': p}\)
        except: pass
    if not parsed: return None
    interesting = [x for x in parsed if 5 <= x['p'] <= 95]
    pool = interesting if interesting else parsed
    return sorted\(pool, key=lambda x: -x['p']\)[0]

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Top markets from /events:'\)
print\(\)
for e in data[:15]:
    best = pick_best\(e.get\('markets', []\)\)
    if not best: continue
    cat = get_category\(e\)
    vol = e.get\('volume24hr', 0\)
    print\(f'[{cat}] {best[\\"q\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'       {best[\\"p\\"]}% | vol24h: \\${vol:,.0f}'\)
    print\(\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?active=true&closed=false&limit=30&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys

TAG_TO_CATEGORY = {
  'politics': 'POLITICS', 'elections': 'POLITICS', 'election': 'POLITICS',
  'crypto': 'CRYPTO', 'bitcoin': 'CRYPTO', 'ethereum': 'CRYPTO',
  'sports': 'SPORTS', 'soccer': 'SPORTS', 'nba': 'SPORTS', 'nfl': 'SPORTS',
  'fifa-world-cup': 'SPORTS', '2026-fifa-world-cup': 'SPORTS',
  'economy': 'ECONOMY', 'fed-rates': 'ECONOMY', 'fed': 'ECONOMY',
  'technology': 'TECH', 'ai': 'TECH', 'openai': 'TECH',
  'geopolitics': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'war': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'russia': 'GEOPOLITICS',
  'ukraine': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'china': 'GEOPOLITICS', 'iran': 'GEOPOLITICS',
  'middle-east': 'GEOPOLITICS',
}

def get_category\(e\):
    for tag in e.get\('tags', []\):
        s = \(tag.get\('slug'\) or ''\).lower\(\)
        if s in TAG_TO_CATEGORY: return TAG_TO_CATEGORY[s]
    text = f'{e[\\"title\\"]} {e[\\"slug\\"]}'.lower\(\)
    for kw, cat in [\('crypto','CRYPTO'\),\('world cup','SPORTS'\),\('nba','SPORTS'\),\('fed rate','ECONOMY'\),\('war','GEOPOLITICS'\),\('russia','GEOPOLITICS'\),\('election','POLITICS'\),\('president','POLITICS'\),\('ai ','TECH'\)]:
        if kw in text: return cat
    return 'TRENDING'

def pick_best\(markets\):
    parsed = []
    for m in markets:
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomePrices','[]'\)\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomePrices'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomePrices', []\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(m.get\('outcomes','[]'\)\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomes'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomes', []\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i, o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\) == 'yes'\), 0\)
            p = round\(float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100\)
            parsed.append\({'q': m['question'], 'p': p}\)
        except: pass
    if not parsed: return None
    interesting = [x for x in parsed if 5 <= x['p'] <= 95]
    if interesting:
        return sorted\(interesting, key=lambda x: -x['p']\)[0]
    best = sorted\(parsed, key=lambda x: -x['p']\)[0]
    if best['p'] >= 99 or best['p'] <= 1: return None
    return best

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
shown = 0
for e in data:
    best = pick_best\(e.get\('markets', []\)\)
    if not best: continue
    cat = get_category\(e\)
    vol = e.get\('volume24hr', 0\)
    print\(f'[{cat}] {best[\\"q\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'       {best[\\"p\\"]}% | vol24h: \\${vol:,.0f}'\)
    print\(\)
    shown += 1
    if shown >= 12: break
print\(f'Total shown: {shown}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?limit=100&active=true&closed=false&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys, re

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Markets with prob 30-70% that would be selected:'\)
print\(\)
for e in data:
    for m in e.get\('markets', []\):
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(m['outcomePrices']\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomePrices'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomePrices', []\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(m['outcomes']\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomes'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomes', []\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i,o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\)=='yes'\), 0\)
            prob = round\(float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100\)
            if 30 <= prob <= 70:
                title = m.get\('groupItemTitle',''\)
                q = m.get\('question',''\)
                is_abbrev = bool\(re.match\(r'^\(Team\\s+\)?[A-Z]{2,4}$', title.strip\(\)\)\) if title else False
                print\(f'  [{\\"SKIP\\" if is_abbrev else \\"OK  \\"}] {prob}% | title=\\"{title}\\" | {q[:80]}'\)
        except: pass
" 2>/dev/null | head -40)

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?limit=100&active=true&closed=false&order=volume24hr&ascending=false" -H "Accept: application/json" | python3 -c "
import json, sys, re

data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Markets that would now be selected \(events with <=8 sub-markets\):'\)
found = False
for e in data:
    markets = e.get\('markets', []\)
    if len\(markets\) > 8:
        continue
    for m in markets:
        try:
            prices = json.loads\(m['outcomePrices']\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomePrices'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomePrices', []\)
            outcomes = json.loads\(m['outcomes']\) if isinstance\(m.get\('outcomes'\), str\) else m.get\('outcomes', []\)
            yes_idx = next\(\(i for i,o in enumerate\(outcomes\) if o.lower\(\)=='yes'\), 0\)
            prob = round\(float\(prices[yes_idx]\) * 100\)
            q = m.get\('question',''\)
            title = m.get\('groupItemTitle',''\)
            if 30 <= prob <= 70 and 'Any Other' not in q and len\(q\) >= 25:
                print\(f'  {prob}% | markets={len\(markets\)} | {q[:90]}'\)
                found = True
                break
        except: pass
    if found: break
print\(\)
print\('First 10 eligible events:'\)
count = 0
for e in data:
    markets = e.get\('markets', []\)
    if len\(markets\) <= 8:
        print\(f'  {len\(markets\)} markets | vol24h={e.get\(\\"volume24hr\\",0\):,.0f} | {e[\\"title\\"]}'\)
        count += 1
        if count >= 10: break
" 2>/dev/null)
